svg.text: Costas loop gain tradeoff: faster pull-in costs steady-state calm

text.tspan: A gentler loop is calmer after lock. A hotter loop gets there faster if the coarse handoff is rough.
The front end stays fixed here. Only the loop gains change.

svg.text: Phase-only coarse acquisition under a harder residual ramp

text.tspan: 24-symbol moving average of decision error after coarse phase only

svg.text: gentle: no clean settle in window
Tracking-mode frequency jitter after coarse frequency help

text.tspan: the coarse front end already landed near lock; now the loop just has to stay quiet

svg.text: symbol index within the last 260-symbol window
Speed versus calm, side by side

text.tspan: left bars: phase-only settle time in the harder case
right bars: tracking jitter after freq+phase acquisition
No single loop gain wins everywhere.
